title: Overhauled Mobs Refreshed
description: This pack changes the Creeper & Enderman textures to the ones from Overhaul mods by joosh_7889
body:
### Overhauled Mobs Refreshed

- This pack changes the Creeper & Enderman (more in the future) textures to the Vanilla ones from Overhaul mods by joosh_7889.
- You need Fresh Animations by Fresh__LX and OptiFine (or replacement mods) for the Refreshed variant of this pack to work.
- The Vanillised version works with FA too, but then the Mobs' eyes are still and not animated.
- Be sure to check the Files tab before downloading to get the right version of the pack.

### All Rights Reserved:

- This work is under All Rights Reserved license.

### Can I use your work in my own creations?

- Feel free to give my work a new life for as long as you credit me in the creation you use it in.
- When using my work please post a link to an official site.
- When crediting my work you can use either "Dawortar" or "Dakinate", both nicknames are associated with me.
